response.justification: Highly experienced senior/staff engineer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and full-stack background that easily exceeds the technical bar for a junior/mid role. However, the position is entry-level and requires high on-site presence, while the candidate is currently based in Lagos, Nigeria and is a Staff Engineer — creating significant overqualification, seniority-mismatch, and relocation/on-site concerns. Worth a screening call only if relocation and a step-down in seniority are acceptable to the candidate.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience across multiple senior roles
Full-stack breadth including REST APIs, databases, Docker/Kubernetes, and AI/LLM tooling
Demonstrated clean-architecture mindset (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development)
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior level applying to an entry-level position
Located in Lagos, Nigeria; role requires high on-site presence (likely Germany)
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed (experience is with MongoDB/MySQL/SQL generally)
